queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'CodeMeter Runtime Kit %' AND publisher = 'WIBU-SYSTEMS AG';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'CodeMeter Runtime Kit %' AND publisher = 'WIBU-SYSTEMS AG' AND version_compare(version, '9.00.8031.500') < 0);
